title: terminalia bialata
intro: Terminalia bialata, also known as the Kushta or Kustha, is a plant species that belongs to the Combretaceae family and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. It has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Terminalia bialata include its ability to treat skin conditions such as leprosy, eczema, and acne, as well as its use in reducing fever and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Terminalia bialata include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their efficacy.
